title: Media Pool / Ingest Kernel
steps: Implement safe ingest and media-pool capability helpers
Add offline probe/report tests
Add live validation with synthetic video, audio, still, and image sequence media
Classify import, metadata, relink, proxy, matte, marker, and property boundaries
Document support map in docs/media-pool-ingest-kernel.md
Run release validation and ship a focused release

title: Render / Deliver Kernel
steps: Implement render compatibility and settings validation helpers
Add offline render matrix/report tests
Add live validation with a tiny synthetic timeline and temp render target
Classify format, codec, resolution, render setting, job, and quick export boundaries
Document support map in docs/render-deliver-kernel.md
Run release validation and ship a focused release

title: Markers / Review Annotation Kernel
steps: Implement unified annotation normalization and copy/report helpers
Add offline marker payload and review report tests
Add live validation across timeline, timeline item, and media pool item scopes
Classify marker fields, custom data, flags, colors, frame aliases, and scope-copy boundaries
Document support map in docs/review-annotation-kernel.md
Run release validation and ship a focused release

title: Color / Grade Kernel
steps: Implement grade, node graph, gallery, and color group capability helpers
Add offline graph/version/gallery report tests
Add live validation with synthetic color media and disposable stills
Classify CDL, DRX, LUT, grade copy, version, group graph, gallery, and AI-tool boundaries
Document support map in docs/color-grade-kernel.md
Run release validation and ship a focused release

title: Fusion Composition Kernel
steps: Implement Fusion graph capability, IO, and safe mutation helpers
Add offline Fusion target, IO, and report tests
Add live validation against a synthetic timeline item Fusion comp
Classify tool availability, input/output writability, connections, keyframes, attrs, and import/export boundaries
Document support map in docs/fusion-composition-kernel.md
Run release validation and ship a focused release

title: Timeline Conform / Interchange Kernel
steps: Implement timeline comparison, gap/overlap, source range, and relink-plan helpers
Add offline conform diff and report tests
Add live validation with synthetic multi-track timelines and temp interchange files
Classify FCPXML, EDL, AAF, DRT, round-trip, missing media, and relink boundaries
Document support map in docs/timeline-conform-interchange-kernel.md
Run release validation and ship a focused release

title: Audio / Fairlight Kernel
steps: Implement audio property, voice isolation, mapping, transcription, and subtitle capability helpers
Add offline audio mapping and state classification tests
Add live validation with generated video/audio-only media
Classify track/item properties, voice isolation, auto-sync, transcription, subtitles, and Fairlight preset boundaries
Document support map in docs/audio-fairlight-kernel.md
Run release validation and ship a focused release

title: Project / Database / Archive Kernel
steps: Implement disposable project, settings snapshot, preset, archive, and database safety helpers
Add offline project safety and settings diff tests
Add live validation with _mcp_ disposable projects only
Classify project CRUD, import/export, archive/restore, settings, presets, folders, database, and cloud boundaries
Document support map in docs/project-lifecycle-kernel.md
Run release validation and ship a focused release

title: Extension Authoring Kernel
steps: Implement lifecycle-aware extension capability helpers
Add offline template, path guard, and restart/refresh classification tests
Add live validation for MCP-marked generated Fuse, DCTL, and script files
Classify install, read, validate, remove, refresh, restart-required, and execution boundaries
Document support map in docs/extension-authoring-kernel.md
Run release validation and ship a focused release
